violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Inspector provided application. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025
Soft cheeses were observed exceeding 7 days. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Working containers of oil and water are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Sandwiches and salads packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Sheet pans were observed stored on a wooden/carpeted dolly. PIC had trays brought to be cleaned and sanitized; dolly removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the stand mixers, waffle makers have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the rolling rack had an accumulation of rodent droppings. Staff cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: -floor tiles in dry storage area -ceiling paint peeling in dry storage area -wall paint in kitchen near catering supplies. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The floors in the dry storage and kitchen area have an accumlation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
At the time of inspection, handwash sink in the employee break area was inoperable. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with orange/red biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Insect aerosol was stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the food preparation area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The presence of rodents and flies are not controlled as evidenced by droppings and dead insects. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Ice machine door was not in good repair, observed being held together with tape. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of rodent droppings. PIC informed. 1. Dishwasher (ledge) 2. Equipment storage (shelving) New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The floors in the following areas have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. 1. Ovens (behind) 2. Sinks (throughout kitchen) 3. Ware-washing area (throughout) 4. Equipment storage (behind) New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The wall junctures in the ware-washing area do not have coving, observed exposed sheetrock. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The wall in the ware-washing area is in poor repair, observed chipping paint and exposed sheetrock. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of dust, soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The fans in the walk-in cooler (beverage) have an accumulation of dust and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
